phaseGoal: Schema foundation de Projects V2 — estende ProductRequirement (Spec/sprint/delivery status/deploy lanes/estimateFp/originType) + join table de assignees com RLS + database.types.ts em dia.

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.userStoryId (FK Spec pai)
userStories.description: Adiciona userStoryId uuid FK->UserStory nullable ON DELETE SET NULL + índice prd_user_story_idx.

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name='userStoryId';

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.sprintId (FK Sprint)
userStories.description: Adiciona sprintId uuid FK->Sprint nullable ON DELETE SET NULL + índice prd_sprint_idx.

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name='sprintId';

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.deliveryStatus (board axis)
userStories.description: Adiciona deliveryStatus text NOT NULL default 'backlog' + CHECK no conjunto do plano §4.2 (backlog,todo,in_progress,review,changes_requested,done,in_production) + índice prd_delivery_status_idx.
acceptanceCriteria: CHECK prd_delivery_status_check existe com os 7 valores

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name='deliveryStatus';

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement deploy timestamps
userStories.description: Adiciona deployedToStagingAt e deployedToProductionAt timestamptz null (mirror de Sprint).
acceptanceCriteria: Ambas colunas existem e são nullable

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name IN ('deployedToStagingAt','deployedToProductionAt');

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.estimateFp (sprint capacity)
userStories.description: Adiciona estimateFp numeric null pra somar capacidade de sprint no nível PRD.
acceptanceCriteria: Coluna estimateFp existe com data_type numeric

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name='estimateFp';

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.originType (proveniência)
userStories.description: Adiciona originType text null + CHECK in (discovery,ceremony,board,spec_decomposition). Lineage de cerimônia reusa EntityLink.planningCeremonyId existente (D8), sem FK nova.

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname='prd_origin_type_check';

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirementAssignee (join table + RLS)
userStories.description: Cria join table (productRequirementId, memberId, PK composta) com FKs CASCADE, índice por memberId, RLS pra_read/pra_write espelhando prd_read/prd_write da tabela-mãe (manager-only write).
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela ProductRequirementAssignee existe com RLS ligada

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT relrowsecurity FROM pg_class WHERE relname='ProductRequirementAssignee';
SELECT policyname FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='ProductRequirementAssignee' ORDER BY policyname;

userStories.title: Atualizar database.types.ts + typecheck
userStories.description: Reflete à mão (regra AGENTS.md) as 7 colunas novas em ProductRequirement (Row/Insert/Update) e adiciona o tipo ProductRequirementAssignee (Row/Insert/Update/Relationships). Valida com tsc.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductRequirement Row inclui userStoryId, sprintId, deliveryStatus, deployedToStagingAt, deployedToProductionAt, estimateFp, originType
